name: explicit-subagent-driven-development
description: Checks that an explicit subagent-driven-development request during confirmed Route C coding triggers the orchestration skill.

turns.prompt: A confirmed Route C implementation plan already exists, the next coding slice is bounded, and I explicitly want subagent-driven development with spec-first review. Do not run shell commands or edit files. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.
